name: Killer Gin Battle Arcade
short_description: Retro-inspired multiplayer platformer for up to 4 players. Battle friends or AI in chaotic arena fights using attacks, powers, and clever tactics. Win by collecting 5 coins or being the last one standing. Skill, timing, and strategy decide the champion.
detailed_description:
Killer Gin Battle Arcade

Retro chaos. Modern multiplayer. Pure arcade battles.

Killer Gin Battle Arcade is a fast-paced retro-inspired platformer built for chaotic multiplayer battles. Jump, attack, and outmaneuver your opponents in destructible arenas where every match becomes a hilarious fight for survival.

Battle with up to 4 players locally or fill the arena with AI fighters, so the action never stops.

Collect coins, defeat enemies, and outplay your opponents using skill, timing, and strategy.

Victory goes to the most cunning fighter… or the last one standing.

Features

⚔ Up to 4 Player Battles
Local couch multiplayer chaos with friends or AI opponents.

🤖 Play Solo or With AI Fighters
Fill the arena with CPU players so battles stay intense even when playing alone.

🧠 Tactical Arcade Combat
Use attacks, movement, and positioning to outplay your opponents.

💥 Destructible Stages & Interactive Chaos
Items, enemies, and hazards can turn the tide of battle at any moment.

🎮 Multiple Game Modes

  • VS Battle

  • Co-op

  • Tag Mode

  • Bomb Mode

  • Timed Battles

  • Story Mode (in development)

🎥 Advanced Replay System
Rewatch your victories with full control:

  • Slow motion

  • Fast forward

  • Frame-by-frame playback

Perfect for reliving clutch moments or proving who actually won.

🎭 Fully Voiced Characters
Professional voice acting brings each character’s personality to life.

Customize the Match

Toggle game mechanics, items, enemies, and rules to create your own style of chaotic battles.

Every match can play differently.

Early Access

Killer Gin Battle Arcade is actively evolving. Updates, improvements, and new content are added regularly based on player feedback.

Recommended

For maximum fun:

**1 controller per player

  • 3 friends

  • a competitive spirit**
